results.name: greatsword
results.description: A sword characterized by its large size and distinctive feature of being wielded with two hands on a long grip

results.name: green dragon (dnd)
results.description: A forest-dwelling species of dragon from Dungeons and Dragons with the ability to exhale a cloud of toxic gas as a breath weapon.

results.name: green hill zone
results.description: The iconic first level of the original Sonic the Hedgehog game.

results.name: greensleeves
results.description: An archdruid of Dominaria, solely depicted summoning a badger.

results.name: greenwheel
results.description: An area of bio-domes in Ghirapur.

results.name: griffin
results.description: A legendary creature with the body of a lion and head of an eagle. Not to be confused with [hippogriff](hippogriff).

results.name: grim return
results.description: Get stuff that just went away back on the battlefield. Compare [cheat death](cheat-death).

results.name: grin
results.description: Like a smile, but with teeth showing.

results.name: grind
results.description: Mill cards until N land cards are milled.

results.name: grond
results.description: A large wolf headed battering ram from The Lord of the Rings

results.name: group hug
results.description: Cards that can be used to benefit other players, including opponents, usually by giving them resources

results.name: group slug
results.description: Cards that are able to deal damage or otherwise target multiple players at once
